text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After much deliberation over which race to make
her final one, she ultimately decides to leave the
choice to me. But which of the four options
should I choose?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first option is the momentous and historical
autumn Tenno Sho, a race that Zenno Rob
Roy—who compared Fine Motion to the main
character of a story—intends to enter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The second option is the Queen Elizabeth II Cup.
It's a majestic race filled with countless memories,
and entering it would allow for another showdown
with the Empress, Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The third option, the Mile Championship, would
make for an equally interesting race. Kawakami
Princess, who gave Fine Motion an intense
"princess showdown," will also be running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then there's the Arima Kinen, where she can race
not only her close friend Daiwa Scarlet but also
Air Shakur! For Fine Motion's final race, I
choose...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our goal is now the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With our final objective decided, we turn our
sights diligently to the race ahead!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our goal is now the Queen Elizabeth II Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With our final objective decided, we turn our
sights diligently to the race ahead!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our goal is now the Mile Championship.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With our final objective decided, we turn our
sights diligently to the race ahead!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our goal is now the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With our final objective decided, we turn our
sights diligently to the race ahead!
